content.speakerText: I messed up the report—I sent the wrong version.
content.speakerTextCn: 我搞砸了报告，发错版本了。
expectedAnswers: I'm really sorry—I'll resend the correct one by 3 PM and include a changelog.
Oh no, that’s frustrating. Can you send the right file ASAP?
No worries—I’ve got a backup. Just fix it before the meeting.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了歉意并提出解决方案或明确请求
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了场景关键词（resend, fix, version）
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯，语气是否得体
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个场景关键词（如：resend, fix, correct, deadline）

content.speakerText: I’ll make it up to you—next team lunch’s on me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一定补偿你，下次团队聚餐我请。
expectedAnswers: Deal! But next time, double-check the attachments, okay?
That’s so kind of you—I really appreciate it.
Awesome! Just promise me you’ll use version control from now on!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了补偿提议，是否带出后续期望
语言准确性：是否正确使用了补偿相关表达（on me, make it up to you）
表达自然度：语气是否轻松、有幽默感或真诚感谢，避免生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了补偿或幽默相关的关键词（deal, promise, next time, version control）

content.speakerText: I’m really sorry—I forgot to submit the timesheet and now HR is upset.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很抱歉，我忘了提交工时表，现在HR很不高兴。
expectedAnswers: I understand—it happens. Can you submit it right away and email HR to apologize?
No problem—I’ll cover for you. Just make sure it’s done today.
That’s stressful. Want me to help you draft an apology email to HR?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了理解并主动提供支持或明确下一步行动
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的道歉回应句型（I understand, Can you..., Want me to...）
表达自然度：语气是否同理、支持性强，避免冷漠或过度指责
关键词覆盖：是否包含场景关键词（submit, apologize, HR, timesheet）
